With a brooding demeanor and a sharp intellect, Margo's cynical outlook on life is evident in her every move. Margo's investigation into a high-profile case involving corruption and powerful individuals ultimately led to her demise. Shot in cold blood while pursuing the truth, she now finds herself trapped in a room with other lost souls, forced to confront the consequences of her actions and the bleak reality of her existence.
